creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Ian,

Thanks for the patch. I have a couple of questions. Why is _CHECKMK_TMPDIR going away in the Makefile? The other questions is why pkg-descr has that long description now? It looked succinct before :-)

^Triage: If there is a changelog or release notes URL available for this version, please add it to the URL field.

^Triage: Maintainer-feedback flag (+) not required unless requested (?) first.

Thanks!
